title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Floral Park, Long Island | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Floral Park, NY. Safe, humane bat extraction from attics and chimneys. Licensed experts serving Long Island. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Floral Park homeowners facing bat infestations need swift, humane solutions to protect their families and properties. Our specialized bat removal and exclusion services safely eliminate bat colonies from attics, chimneys, and wall voids while preventing future entry. With comprehensive inspections and proven exclusion techniques, we restore peace of mind to Floral Park residents.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to Floral Park, combining humane bat removal with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand Long Island's bat species and local building codes, ensuring compliant, effective results that protect both your home and these beneficial animals.
localContext: Floral Park's charming Tudor and Colonial-style homes, many dating back nearly a century, often feature the attic spaces and chimney configurations that attract bat colonies seeking shelter. The tree-lined streets near Centennial Gardens and proximity to Belmont Park create ideal habitats where bats thrive, making professional exclusion essential for homeowners throughout the village.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Floral Park typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the colony size, entry points, and the complexity of your home's architecture. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Floral Park safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use exclusion methods that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry, never trapping bats inside. Our approach complies with New York wildlife protection laws and ensures the safety of your family, pets, and the bats themselves.

faqs.question: When is bat removal season in Long Island?
faqs.answer: Bat exclusion work must avoid maternity season (roughly May through August) when flightless young are present. The ideal times for bat removal in Floral Park are early spring or fall, though we can assess your situation year-round and schedule appropriately.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, brown staining around gaps in soffits or siding, and seeing bats emerge at sunset. If you suspect bats, contact us immediately for a professional inspection.
